description.zh:
嘿！只是想联系你谈一个更简单的工作，既然一些本地渣滓甚至一些更重要的玩家已经注意到我们在调查这件事，你知道这不可能是什么好事，对吧？也许他们中有些人以前为黑帮工作，也许他们只是想要别墅里的所有好东西，谁知道呢，老实说谁在乎呢，他们是一个需要处理掉的问题。

你知道我们谁都不能也不想危及这次行动，别以为你不会因此遭受任何损失——记住你离开塔科夫的车票。我不是在威胁你什么的，我只是在陈述一个事实，如果我们不互相帮助，你就无法离开这里，好吗？总之，你还有那个小交通锥 thing 吗？我希望它还能用，因为你需要亲自去见Lightkeeper家伙，他可能有更重要的工作给你。
description.en:
Hey there! Just wanted to contact you about a more simple job, since some of the local scum and even some more important players have noticed that we're looking into this thing, you know that this can't be a good thing yeah? Maybe some of them worked for the mob back then, maybe they just want all the goodies from that villa, who knows, and honestly who cares, they are a problem that needs to be taken care of.

You know none of us can and wants to endanger this operation, and don't think you won't suffer any damage from this - Remember your ticket out of Tarkov. I'm not threatening you or anything, I'm just stating a fact, you won't be able to make it out of here if we don't help each other, alright? Anyway, you still got that little traffic cone thing? I hope it's working because you'll need to visit the Lightkeeper guy personally, he might have more important jobs for you.
